name: Layout Rhythm Contract
description: Requires varied, purposeful section rhythm instead of repeated AI-card layouts.

rules.check: sections should vary between narrative, proof, architecture, specimen, and critique patterns
premium layouts should use enough whitespace to create reading rhythm
asymmetric desktop layouts must collapse cleanly to mobile
not every idea should be placed inside a same-sized card

remediation: Mix architectural diagrams, proof media, dense docs panels, critique comparisons, and strong editorial sections instead of repeating equal cards.
